lessons.topic: Greeting PMU client and asking what service they want - microblading lip blush eyeliner
Lip colors for permanent makeup - nude pink coral berry what shade you like
Asking about allergies and medical history before permanent makeup - any medications blood thinners pregnant
Setting expectations for permanent makeup - it will fade 40 percent need touch up in 6 weeks healing takes 2 weeks
Understanding what the PMU client really wants vs what they show on Instagram - realistic expectations communication
